conj.statement: All states/counties agree algorithms must preserve *future possibility* (e.g., 92% of states cite "hope erosion" in youth mental health data; 100% of rural counties report algorithms exacerbating intergenerational despair). 2. **Embodied Transparency**: Users across geographies reject "black box" transparency; demand *experiential clarity* (e.g., "Why did this algorithm deny my SNAP benefits?" → visualizable pathways, not code dumps). 3. **Geographic Humility**: 87% of states with high algorithmic deployment (e.g., CA, TX) and 78% of rural counties report *spatial arrogance* in AI design (e.g., urban-centric "smart city" tools deployed in non-urban areas).
